secretKey.description: JWT signing secret key. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

igdbClientId.description: IGDB API client ID. Required — nexorious will not function without valid IGDB credentials.

igdbClientSecret.description: IGDB API client secret. Required — nexorious will not function without valid IGDB credentials.

databaseUrl.description: External database URL. Leave empty to use in-cluster PostgreSQL.

password.description: PostgreSQL password. Use only URL-safe characters when relying on auto-built DATABASE_URL.

secretKeyFrom.description: External secret reference for secretKey. When name and key are both non-empty, the secretKey inline value is ignored.

igdbClientIdFrom.description: External secret reference for igdbClientId. When name and key are both non-empty, the igdbClientId inline value is ignored.

igdbClientSecretFrom.description: External secret reference for igdbClientSecret. When name and key are both non-empty, the igdbClientSecret inline value is ignored.

databaseUrlFrom.description: External secret reference for DATABASE_URL (URI mode). Mutually exclusive with databaseUrl and db*From. When name and key are both non-empty, points to a key in the external secret containing the full connection URL.

dbHostFrom.description: External secret reference for DB_HOST (individual keys mode). Mutually exclusive with databaseUrl and databaseUrlFrom.

dbPortFrom.description: External secret reference for DB_PORT (individual keys mode). Mutually exclusive with databaseUrl and databaseUrlFrom.

dbUserFrom.description: External secret reference for DB_USER (individual keys mode). Mutually exclusive with databaseUrl and databaseUrlFrom.

dbPasswordFrom.description: External secret reference for DB_PASSWORD (individual keys mode). Mutually exclusive with databaseUrl and databaseUrlFrom.

dbNameFrom.description: External secret reference for DB_NAME (individual keys mode). Mutually exclusive with databaseUrl and databaseUrlFrom.
